children.label: A
children.text: begins not later than the date on which coverage terminates under the plan by reason of a qualifying event,

children.label: B
children.text: is of at least 60 days’ duration, and

children.label: i
children.text: the date described in subparagraph (A), or

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of any qualified beneficiary who receives notice under , the date of such notice.section 300bb–6(4) of this title

children.heading: Effect of election on other beneficiaries
children.label: 2 Effect of election on other beneficiaries
children.text: Except as otherwise specified in an election, any election of continuation coverage by a qualified beneficiary described in subparagraph (A)(i) or (B) of shall be deemed to include an election of continuation coverage on behalf of any other qualified beneficiary who would lose coverage under the plan by reason of the qualifying event. If there is a choice among types of coverage under the plan, each qualified beneficiary is entitled to make a separate selection among such types of coverage.section 300bb–8(3) of this title

children.heading: Temporary extension of COBRA election period for certain individuals
children.label: b Temporary extension of COBRA election period for certain individuals

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In the case of a nonelecting TAA-eligible individual and notwithstanding subsection (a), such individual may elect continuation coverage under this subchapter during the 60-day period that begins on the first day of the month in which the individual becomes a TAA-eligible individual, but only if such election is made not later than 6 months after the date of the TAA-related loss of coverage.

children.heading: Commencement of coverage; no reach-back
children.label: 2 Commencement of coverage; no reach-back
children.text: Any continuation coverage elected by a TAA-eligible individual under paragraph (1) shall commence at the beginning of the 60-day election period described in such paragraph and shall not include any period prior to such 60-day election period.

children.label: A
children.text: beginning on the date of the TAA-related loss of coverage, and

children.label: B
children.text: ending on the first day of the 60-day election period described in paragraph (1),

children.label: i
children.text: has a TAA-related loss of coverage; and

children.label: ii
children.text: did not elect continuation coverage under this part during the TAA-related election period.2So in original. This subchapter is not divided into parts.2

children.label: i
children.text: an eligible TAA recipient (as defined in paragraph (2) of ), andsection 35(c) of title 26

children.label: ii
children.text: an eligible alternative TAA recipient (as defined in paragraph (3) of such section).

children.heading: TAA-related election period
children.label: C TAA-related election period
children.text: The term “TAA-related election period” means, with respect to a TAA-related loss of coverage, the 60-day election period under this part which is a direct consequence of such loss.2

children.heading: TAA-related loss of coverage
children.label: D TAA-related loss of coverage
children.text: The term “TAA-related loss of coverage” means, with respect to an individual whose separation from employment gives rise to being an TAA-eligible individual, the loss of health benefits coverage associated with such separation.
